purpose: Regenerate nominal 30-degree idealized model outside this branch
required_inputs: provenance-clear HXC590 generator input; generator version or commit; coordinate-frame convention
outputs: candidate coordinate file; manifest metadata; radial profile for regenerated 30-degree candidate
pass_fail_gate: Regenerated 30-degree profile preserves diagnostic peak-window behavior and major baseline-profile features
branch_action: Do not score variants until this gate passes

purpose: Generate first-pass twist/rise grid after baseline reproduction
required_inputs: validated external generator; twist values 24/26/28/30/32/34/36; rise values 3.20/3.25/3.30/3.35/3.40/3.45/3.50/3.55/3.60 A
outputs: candidate coordinate files; candidate manifest; checksums if practical
pass_fail_gate: Each candidate has complete provenance and atom/element accounting
branch_action: Accept only handed-off coordinate files and manifests

purpose: Generate radial profiles for handed-off candidates
required_inputs: externally generated candidate coordinate files; complete manifest
pass_fail_gate: Profiles are produced with the established diffraction workflow and consistent conventions
branch_action: Run existing profile workflow only after validated handoff

purpose: Score candidate profiles against HXC590 S1 powder windows
required_inputs: radial profiles; HXC590 S1 peak windows; narrow/current/broad tolerance definitions
outputs: match scores; survival summaries; spurious-peak diagnostics if supported
pass_fail_gate: Diagnostic windows and survival criteria are applied consistently
branch_action: Update reports without changing model-generation boundary
score tables; survival summaries; comparison to controls
column9: Claims remain falsification-style unless stronger experimental/model evidence is available
column10: Report limitations and avoid refined phase assignment language
